title: Playwright MCP: playbook cross-cutting (viewport, surface, theme, cmdk, a11y, metrics)
description:
## Tujuan

Test playbook yang tidak terikat 1 halaman — verifikasi cross-cutting policies (Q43, Q44/45, Q46, Q47, Q48, Q50, Q56, Q59) jalan konsisten di seluruh app.

## Skenario

### S1 — Q43 Adaptive viewport gate

Loop atas viewport: `1280x800` (desktop), `900x768` (tablet), `600x800` (phone).

Per viewport, navigate ke setiap route utama (`/`, `/connections`, `/profiles/new`, `/sessions/new`, `/sessions/{id}`, `/settings`):
- Desktop ≥1024: sidebar visible, two-pane full.
- Tablet 768-1024: sidebar → hamburger, two-pane → drill-down master-detail.
- Phone <768: **gate page** "Magic MariaDB Sync requires a wider screen. Please use a tablet or desktop." — no app content.

### S2 — Q44 error envelope shape

Trigger error di setiap endpoint mutating via cmdk action. Per response, assert:
- `Content-Type: application/json`.
- Body `{"error": {"code": "...", "message": "...", "details": ...}}`.
- Header `X-Correlation-ID` echo (UUID v4).

### S3 — Q45 surface layers (5 enum)

| Layer | Trigger | Expected |
|---|---|---|
| field | submit form invalid | inline di bawah input |
| form | server reject submit | banner merah top form |
| page | GET /api/profiles/{bad-id} | empty-state full-page + Retry button |
| background | optimistic rename fail | toast sonner |
| blocking | MarkReady drift critical | modal dialog |

### S4 — Q46 LoadingBoundary variants

| Variant | Lokasi |
|---|---|
| list-skeleton | `/connections`, `/sessions` list |
| form-spinner | submit form Add Connection |
| two-pane-split | `/profiles/new` schema picker |
| report-skeleton | `/sessions/{id}` detail load |
| sse-empty | session running tanpa event awal |
| button-inline | tombol Test Koneksi, MarkReady, StartSync |

Verify masing-masing muncul saat trigger fetch + hilang setelah loaded.

### S5 — Q47 theme dark contrast

1. Toggle dark mode.
2. Per page, `browser_evaluate` panggil `axe.run({rules: {color-contrast: {enabled: true}}})`.
3. Assert no violation level `serious` (kontras < 4.5:1 text atau < 3:1 UI).

### S6 — Q48 cmdk global

Per page, `Ctrl+K` → palette.

Actions wajib (`lib/commands.ts`):
- Navigate ke setiap route utama.
- MarkReady aktif profile.
- StartSync.
- Toggle theme.

Pre-condition: profile aktif `ready` untuk MarkReady action visible.

### S7 — Q50 keyboard nav coverage

Per komponen, navigate-only-keyboard:
- Sidebar (Q42): Tab + Enter expand/collapse.
- Schema picker (Q40): Tab antar pane, Arrow di list, Enter pilih.
- Log accordion (Q38): Tab antar entries, Space toggle expand.
- cmdk (Q48): Cmd+K open, Arrow nav, Enter select, Esc close.

Assert: focus-visible ring muncul (token `--ring`), no `outline: none` tanpa replacement.

### S8 — Q52 correlation ID end-to-end

1. Trigger error toast.
2. Klik "Copy ID" button.
3. `browser_evaluate` baca clipboard → UUID v4 format.
4. Assert sama dengan response header `X-Correlation-ID`.

### S9 — Q55 optimistic rollback

1. Rename profile → intercept `PUT /api/profiles/{id}` return 500.
2. Assert UI revert ke nama lama + toast (Q45 background) "Update gagal, dibatalkan".

### S10 — Q56 prefetch off heavy routes

`browser_evaluate` query semua `<a>` di sidebar/nav, assert:
- `/sessions/{id}` links: `prefetch={false}` (no `<link rel="prefetch">` head).
- `/profiles/{id}` links: same.

### S11 — Q57 Prometheus metrics gated

1. `GET http://127.0.0.1:{port}/metrics` tanpa env → 404.
2. Set `METRICS_ENABLED=true`, restart → endpoint return Prometheus text format.
3. Assert counters: `sync_started_total`, `http_requests_total`, etc.

### S12 — Q59 ListenAddr guard

1. Set `ListenAddr=0.0.0.0:8080` tanpa `MAGIC_ALLOW_REMOTE=true` → binary refuse start, stderr message.
2. Set `MAGIC_ALLOW_REMOTE=true` → start + slog warn banner.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Playbook `tests/playwright-mcp/crosscut.md`.
- [ ] 12 skenario lulus.
- [ ] Helper utilities (viewport loop, axe-core invoke, clipboard read) ditulis ulang di `tests/playwright-mcp/helpers.md`.

## Referensi

DECISIONS-Q1-Q60: Q43, Q44, Q45, Q46, Q47, Q48, Q50, Q52, Q55, Q56, Q57, Q59.

title: Playwright MCP: playbook Sessions (/sessions + detail SSE + log accordion)
description:
## Halaman

`/sessions/new` (start) + `/sessions/{id}` (detail dengan SSE + log accordion).

## Pre-condition fixtures

- 1 profile `ready`.
- Source seed ~200 baris (cukup untuk chunk 500 single, atau bump ke ~1500 untuk multi-chunk).
- Sengaja inject 1 FK violation di Source (`orders.customer_id` reference customer yang akan dihapus mid-sync) untuk uji error 1452 → friendly row log.

## Skenario

### S1 — Start Session happy path

1. Navigate `/sessions/new`.
2. Pilih profile `ready`.
3. Closure preview render daftar tabel topo order (induk dulu).
4. Preflight banner (T1#2): hijau "Skema selaras".
5. Klik "Mulai".
6. Redirect ke `/sessions/{id}`.

### S2 — Live SSE progress (CONTEXT.md "SSE progress")

1. Page mount → SSE connect ke `/api/sse/{id}` (T1#1 — bukan `/api/sessions/{id}/events`).
2. Initial event `snapshot` → render counter (rows_inserted, rows_failed, last 50 row failures).
3. Live `progress` event tiap chunk-commit → counter naik smooth.
4. Reconnect (kill conn manual via `browser_evaluate` close EventSource) → snapshot baru, no gap.

### S3 — Cancel mid-sync (CONTEXT.md "Cancel UX")

1. Saat status `running`, klik **Cancel**.
2. Spinner "Membatalkan…".
3. POST `/api/sessions/{id}/cancel` idempotent.
4. Chunk in-flight tetap commit (latency 100ms-detik).
5. Status final `cancelled` (bukan `interrupted`/`failed`).
6. SSE `event: cancelled` payload `{processed, failed, cancelled_at}`.
7. Badge netral + pesan "{processed} baris sudah masuk Destination, hapus manual jika perlu".

### S4 — Sync Log UI group-by-default (CONTEXT.md "Sync Log UI")

1. Pasca-Session dengan FK violation, render row failures.
2. Default group-by `mariadb_code` via `<Accordion>`.
3. Assert group header: "X baris — Referensi data hilang (1452)".
4. Per group: count, ToFriendly summary, tombol "Unduh CSV grup ini".
5. Expand → tabel 50 baris pertama (Dest table, PK, kolom bermasalah, pesan ramah).
6. Klik "Lihat semua sebagai tabel" → flat paginated 50/halaman, sortable `created_at` + `mariadb_code`.

### S5 — CSV export per-group (CONTEXT.md "CSV export format")

1. Klik "Unduh CSV grup ini" pada group 1452.
2. Browser download triggered.
3. `browser_evaluate` baca file: 8 kolom fixed (waktu, tabel_destination, pk_baris JSON, kolom_bermasalah, nilai_source, kode_mariadb, pesan_teknis, pesan_ramah).
4. Header `UTF-8 BOM` `\xEF\xBB\xBF` first bytes.
5. Filename pattern: `magicsync-failures-{session_id}-{profile_slug}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.csv`.

### S6 — Retry fresh-run (CONTEXT.md "Session retry")

1. Session `cancelled` → tombol "**Mulai Sync Baru**" (bukan "Lanjutkan").
2. Klik → redirect Start Session standar dengan profile pre-selected.
3. New Session ID dibuat, snapshot baru di-freeze.

### S7 — Single-session concurrency (CONTEXT.md ADR-0020)

1. Saat 1 Session `running`, coba `POST /api/sessions` baru via cmdk action.
2. Assert `409 Conflict` envelope `{code: CONFLICT_RUNNING_SESSION, conflict_session_id, conflict_profile_name}`.
3. Toast/banner Q45 form surface tampilkan pesan ramah + link ke session aktif.
4. UI "Mulai Sync" profile lain → `disabled` + tooltip nama profile aktif.

### S8 — Schema drift block (CONTEXT.md "Schema drift")

1. Ubah Source schema mid-test: `ALTER TABLE customers DROP COLUMN email`.
2. Start Session → Preflight catch.
3. DriftBanner (T1#2): "Kolom Source `customers.email` tidak ditemukan…".
4. Tombol Start disabled.

### S9 — Profile snapshot badge (CONTEXT.md "Profile snapshot")

1. Session detail render snapshot.
2. Edit profile mid (status turun ke `draft`).
3. Reload Session detail → badge "profile berubah" muncul (hash beda).

### S10 — Logs paginated hybrid (T1#6, Q38)

1. Session status `done` → log viewer fetch `/api/sessions/{id}/logs?limit=50&cursor=...`.
2. Scroll → load next cursor.
3. Saat session jadi `running` lagi (retry) → switch ke SSE.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Playbook `tests/playwright-mcp/session.md`.
- [ ] 10 skenario lulus.
- [ ] SSE endpoint = `/api/sse/{id}` (T1#1 verified).

## Referensi

CONTEXT.md "Sync Session", "SSE progress", "Cancel UX", "Sync Log UI", "CSV export format", "Schema drift", "Single-session global concurrency", "Session retry", "Profile snapshot"; Q38, Q44, Q45; T1#1, T1#2, T1#6.

title: Playwright MCP: playbook Settings / Health (credential wizard, retention, version)
description:
## Halaman

`/settings` (atau `/settings/health` — placement final di FE) — Health, Retention, Credential mode, About/Version.

## Pre-condition fixtures

- Fresh state untuk first-credential wizard.
- Seeded state dengan sync_logs > 100k untuk uji retention counter (atau force-insert via fixture SQL).

## Skenario

### S1 — Credential mode wizard lazy-prompt (CONTEXT.md "Credential mode wizard")

1. Fresh state, navigate `/`.
2. Klik "Tambah Koneksi" pertama kali.
3. **Wizard muncul** (bukan first-run binary).
4. 2 opsi awam:
   - "Komputer ini hanya saya pakai sendiri" → OS keystore.
   - "Saya bawa di USB / komputer berganti-ganti" → passphrase.
5. Detail teknis (AES-GCM, Argon2id) di `<Collapsible>`.
6. Pilih passphrase → wajib checkbox "Saya sudah simpan passphrase di tempat aman, lupa = data hilang permanen".
7. "Lanjut" disabled sampai checkbox ✓.

### S2 — Passphrase unlock rate limit

1. Restart binary (passphrase mode).
2. Pertama akses → dialog passphrase.
3. Salah 3x → lock 60dtk (countdown visible).
4. Setelah unlock → koneksi list muncul.

### S3 — Re-key flow (Settings → Keamanan)

1. Navigate `/settings`.
2. Section "Keamanan" → klik "Ganti metode penyimpanan".
3. Pilih mode baru → confirm dialog.
4. 1 transaksi SQLite atomic.
5. Toast sukses, badge mode update.

### S4 — Retention counter + CSV bulk export (CONTEXT.md "Retention via capacity")

1. Section "Health".
2. Assert counter: `sync_logs` X / 500k high, `sync_sessions` Y / 10k.
3. Ukuran DB file (MB).
4. Tombol "Bersihkan log lama" → **block** sampai user export atau confirm.
5. Klik → modal "Export dulu?" → tombol "Unduh semua sebagai CSV" (1 file per Session, bukan gabungan).
6. Setelah export → tombol "Hapus sekarang" enabled.

### S5 — About / Version (Q57 + ADR-0021)

1. Section "About".
2. Assert version string dari `GET /api/version` (`-X main.version`).
3. App env (dev/prod), data dir path.

### S6 — Remote banner persistent (Q59)

1. Set `MAGIC_ALLOW_REMOTE=true` di binary env.
2. Restart binary.
3. Navigate any page → banner merah persistent top "Remote access enabled. API not authenticated. Bind to 127.0.0.1 untuk keamanan."
4. Banner tidak bisa di-dismiss (advisory permanent).

### S7 — Timezone advisory (CONTEXT.md "Timezone UTC enforcement")

1. Section Health → badge "Aplikasi memaksa zona UTC saat sync".
2. Per-koneksi: tooltip menampilkan `connections.notes_text` dari handshake (`@@session.time_zone`, `@@global.time_zone`, `@@system_time_zone`).

### S8 — Theme persistence reload (Q47)

1. Klik toggle theme dark.
2. Reload page.
3. Theme tetap dark (next-themes localStorage).

### S9 — A11y axe-core dev (Q50)

1. Run di dev mode (`make dev`).
2. Buka DevTools console.
3. Assert no axe-core violations level `serious`/`critical` pada page Settings.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Playbook `tests/playwright-mcp/settings.md`.
- [ ] 9 skenario lulus.
- [ ] Wizard step accessible via keyboard (Tab/Enter/Esc).

## Referensi

CONTEXT.md "Credential mode wizard", "Retention via capacity", "Timezone", "Distribusi M8"; Q47, Q50, Q57, Q59; ADR-0021.

title: Playwright MCP: playbook Connections (/connections)
description:
## Halaman

`/connections` — Connection list + Add/Edit form.

## Pre-condition fixtures

- Docker MariaDB Source di port 3307, Dest di port 3308 (lihat infra issue).
- Salah satu container distop sementara untuk uji handshake fail.

## Skenario

### S1 — Tambah koneksi happy path (Test+Save split)

1. Navigate `/connections`.
2. Klik "Tambah Koneksi".
3. Fill form: name, host `127.0.0.1`, port `3307`, user `root`, password `root`, db `magicsync_src`.
4. Klik **"Test Koneksi"** — assert button spinner muncul (Q46 `button-inline`), lalu badge hijau "OK" + waktu test.
5. Klik **"Simpan"** — assert toast (Q45 background) "Koneksi disimpan", redirect ke list.
6. Assert row baru muncul dengan badge "OK".

### S2 — Handshake fail per error code (`ToFriendlyHandshake`)

Loop atas error code dengan setup berbeda:
- **1045** password salah → assert pesan "Username atau password salah".
- **1049** db tidak ditemukan → "Database tidak ditemukan".
- **2003** server down (stop container) → "Server tidak terhubung".
- **2002** wrong port → "Koneksi timeout / port salah".

Untuk tiap kasus: badge `Gagal` di list, klik row → banner kuning di Builder advisory (tidak block save).

### S3 — Edit credential reset status

1. Edit koneksi yang `status=OK`.
2. Ubah password.
3. Save → assert badge berubah ke `Belum dites` (CONTEXT.md "Edit credential -> reset `untested`").

### S4 — Edit skip-password (T1#3)

1. Edit koneksi, kosongkan field password, save.
2. Assert backend **tidak overwrite** `password_ciphertext` (verify via re-test koneksi tetap OK tanpa re-input).

### S5 — Delete cascade (T1#5)

1. Buat profile yang reference connection ini.
2. Coba delete → assert error envelope `code=CONFLICT_RUNNING_SESSION` ATAU dialog konfirmasi "Profile X akan ikut terhapus, lanjut?".
3. Jika ada session running → 409 + pesan ramah.

### S6 — Form validation (Q49 react-hook-form + zod)

1. Submit form kosong → assert inline field errors (Q45 field surface).
2. Port = "abc" → "Port harus angka".
3. Server-rejected duplicate name → banner form (Q45 form surface).

### S7 — Cross-cutting

- **Correlation ID** (Q44/Q52): trigger error, toast tampilkan "Copy ID" button → klik → clipboard berisi UUID.
- **LoadingBoundary** (Q46): saat fetch list, `list-skeleton` 3-5 row muncul.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Playbook `tests/playwright-mcp/connections.md`.
- [ ] 7 skenario lulus.
- [ ] Password input `<input type="password">` + `autocomplete="new-password"` (a11y Q50).

## Referensi

CONTEXT.md "Connection test (Test+Save split)", "Credential encryption", T1#3, T1#4, T1#5, Q44, Q45, Q46, Q49.

title: Playwright MCP: playbook Profile builder (/profiles)
description:
## Halaman

`/profiles/new` (create) + `/profiles/{id}` (builder/view/edit) — Mapping Profile + Mapping Builder.

## Pre-condition fixtures

- 2 koneksi (Source + Dest, status OK).
- Schema fixture: `customers`, `orders`, `order_items` di Source; mirror + `customers.notes` extra di Dest.

## Skenario

### S1 — Create profile + Selection Set (Q40 two-pane picker)

1. Navigate `/profiles/new`.
2. Pilih Source + Dest dari dropdown.
3. Schema picker two-pane muncul. **Keyboard nav** (Q50):
   - `Tab` → fokus list kiri (Source tables).
   - `Arrow Down` → highlight `orders`.
   - `Enter` → pilih.
4. Closure Advisor dialog muncul: "Tabel `customers` ditambahkan sebagai induk FK".
5. Konfirmasi → assert tabel `customers` + `orders` masuk Selection Set.

### S2 — Mapping Builder (CONTEXT.md "Mapping Builder UI")

1. Builder render `<Tabs>` per Dest table di sidebar `<ScrollArea>`.
2. Klik tab `orders`.
3. Assert HTML `<Table>` 4 kolom: `Kolom Destination | Sumber nilai | Detail | Status`.
4. Auto-matched columns: background putih + badge "Auto" abu-abu.
5. Unresolved: background kuning muda + badge "Isi" oranye.
6. Counter header "X dari Y belum diisi".

### S3 — Sumber `<Select>` grouped (5 opsi semantik)

Per kolom Dest, buka `<Select>`:
- Group "Kolom Source" → pilih kolom.
- Group "Opsi khusus": Konstanta, Kosongkan/NULL, Default DB, Lewati.
- Pilih "Konstanta" → text input adjacent muncul (conditional render).
- Pilih "Lewati" pada `customers.notes` (extra Dest col) → assert tidak ada warning.

### S4 — Validasi structural (CONTEXT.md "Profile lifecycle")

1. PK Dest `orders.id` di-set "Konstanta" → assert inline error "PK Dest harus dari Source".
2. PK dengan Rule → error "PK tidak boleh punya Rule".
3. NOT NULL no-default di-set "Kosongkan/NULL" → error.
4. NOT NULL ber-DEFAULT di-set "Lewati" → **boleh** (no error).

### S5 — Rule dialog + live preview (CONTEXT.md "Sample Preview live inline per Rule")

1. Klik "Tambahkan aturan" di Detail kolom `orders.status`.
2. `<Dialog>` Rule editor terbuka.
3. Pilih `enum_map`, isi mapping.
4. Panel preview di bawah form muncul: tabel 2-kolom `Nilai Source -> Hasil`, 5 distinct + 1 NULL.
5. Debounce 300ms saat edit DSL → preview re-fetch.
6. Edge `status='error'` per row → cell `Hasil` "Tipe tidak cocok" tanpa block save.

### S6 — MarkReady flow (Q29 blocking modal)

1. Klik "Tandai siap dipakai".
2. Modal blocking muncul (Q45 blocking surface) berisi DriftReport preflight (T1#2).
3. Jika ada drift → list issue.
4. Konfirmasi → badge `Draft` (abu) → `Siap` (hijau), tombol "Mulai Sync" muncul.

### S7 — Edit ready profile → auto-downgrade (T1#7)

1. Profile status `ready`.
2. Edit pairing satu kolom.
3. Dialog confirm "Profile akan turun ke Draft, lanjut?".
4. Konfirmasi → status `draft`, badge berubah.

### S8 — Cross-profile collision (CONTEXT.md "Cross-profile collision")

1. Buat profile B dengan Selection Set overlap profile A pada Dest sama.
2. MarkReady B → error envelope `code=COLLISION` dgn list tabel + nama profile owner.

### S9 — Optimistic rename (Q55)

1. Klik rename profile.
2. Type new name → blur.
3. Assert UI flip immediately (SWR optimistic), toast saat server confirm.

### S10 — Cross-cutting

- **Prefetch off** (Q56): assert `<Link href="/profiles/{id}">` punya `prefetch={false}` attribute.
- **Counter** "X dari Y kolom siap" di header builder.
- **Skip drag-drop** (CONTEXT.md): pastikan tidak ada `[draggable]` attribute — semua input via `<Select>` cmdk searchable.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Playbook `tests/playwright-mcp/profile.md`.
- [ ] 10 skenario lulus.
- [ ] Keyboard nav Q40 two-pane tested (Tab, Arrow, Enter, Esc).

## Referensi

CONTEXT.md "Mapping Builder UI", "Profile lifecycle", "Sample Preview", "Cross-profile collision"; Q29, Q40, Q45, Q49, Q55, Q56; T1#2, T1#7.

title: Playwright MCP: playbook Dashboard / Onboarding (/)
description:
## Halaman

`/` — Dashboard / Onboarding (`web/src/app/page.tsx`).

## Pre-condition fixtures

- **Fresh state**: SQLite kosong, `magicsync.db` baru. `hasConnections=false`, `hasReadyProfile=false`, `hasAnySession=false`.
- **Mid state**: 1 Source + 1 Dest connection ada, no profile ready.
- **Active state**: ≥1 Session pernah jalan (`hasAnySession=true`) → 3-card disappear, daftar Sessions terbaru muncul.

## Skenario

### S1 — Fresh state (CONTEXT.md First-run onboarding)

1. `browser_navigate` ke URL binary.
2. `browser_snapshot` → assert 3 shadcn `<Card>` muncul dengan judul:
   - "Tambahkan Koneksi" (unlocked, button enabled).
   - "Buat Mapping Profile" (locked, `aria-disabled=true`, opacity reduced).
   - "Mulai Sync Pertama" (locked).
3. Hover card #2 → tooltip "Lengkapi langkah sebelumnya dulu" muncul (via `browser_evaluate` query tooltip role).
4. Klik CTA card #1 → assert URL = `/connections`.

### S2 — Mid state

1. Seed via API: `POST /api/connections` x2 (Source + Dest).
2. Reload `/`.
3. Assert card #1 ✓ checkmark, card #2 unlocked CTA primer, card #3 masih locked.

### S3 — Active state

1. Seed Session via API: `POST /api/sessions` dengan profile `ready`.
2. Tunggu status `done` (poll `GET /api/sessions/{id}`).
3. Reload `/`.
4. Assert 3-card **hilang**, ganti list "Sessions terbaru" + tombol "Mulai sync baru".

### S4 — Cross-cutting

- **Theme toggle** (Q47): klik tombol sun/moon di header → `<html class="dark">` toggle. Reload → state persist (localStorage).
- **cmdk** (Q48): `browser_press_key("Control+k")` → palette muncul, ketik "connections" → Enter → URL = `/connections`.
- **Viewport gate** (Q43): resize ke 700px width via `browser_resize` → page "requires wider screen" muncul.
- **Remote banner** (Q59): set `MAGIC_ALLOW_REMOTE=true` di env binary → banner merah top muncul "Remote access enabled..."

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Playbook markdown commit di `tests/playwright-mcp/dashboard.md`.
- [ ] Semua 4 skenario lulus pada binary M8 candidate.
- [ ] Selector pakai accessibility role (`getByRole('button', {name: 'Tambahkan Koneksi'})`), bukan text query mentah.

## Referensi

CONTEXT.md — "First-run onboarding (3-card progress)", Q43, Q47, Q48, Q59.

title: Playwright MCP: infrastruktur harness + fixtures + Makefile
description:
## Tujuan

Setup infrastruktur agar agen bisa menjalankan Playwright MCP runner berulang-kali secara reproducible.

## Deliverables

1. **`tests/playwright-mcp/README.md`** — guide untuk agen:
   - Cara invoke MCP tools (`browser_navigate`, `browser_snapshot`, `browser_click`, `browser_type`, `browser_press_key`, `browser_evaluate`).
   - Convention selector: **WAJIB pakai accessibility role/name** (alignment Q50 a11y target). Hindari `text=` dan `nth-child`.
   - Format playbook markdown: pre-condition / langkah bernomor / assertion via accessibility snapshot.
   - Fixture seed: 2 docker container MariaDB (`magicsync-src` port 3307, `magicsync-dst` port 3308) — `docker compose -f tests/fixtures/docker-compose.yml up -d`.

2. **`tests/fixtures/docker-compose.yml`** + `tests/fixtures/src-seed.sql` + `tests/fixtures/dst-seed.sql`:
   - Source: 3 tabel sederhana (`customers`, `orders`, `order_items`) dengan FK chain.
   - Destination: skema mirror + 1 perbedaan sengaja (kolom `customers.notes` ada di Dest, tidak di Source) untuk uji Pairing "Lewati"/"Default DB".
   - Seed ~200 baris per tabel untuk uji chunk boundary 500.

3. **`Makefile` target**:
   ```
   test-e2e-up: docker compose up -d (fixtures)
   test-e2e-down: docker compose down -v
   test-e2e-bin: make build && launch binary background, write URL to .test-url
   test-e2e: test-e2e-up + test-e2e-bin + echo URL ke stdout untuk agen MCP
   ```

4. **`tests/playwright-mcp/results/.gitignore`** — ignore semua kecuali `.gitkeep`.

5. **Env var documentation**: `MAGICSYNC_DATA_DIR` belum ada V1 (CONTEXT.md), jadi binary test pakai temp dir via `cp` binary ke `/tmp/magicsync-e2e-<run>/` lalu run dari sana — supaya `magicsync.db` (same-dir-as-binary, ADR-0022) tidak polusi.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Agen baru bisa baca README → `make test-e2e` → terima URL → langsung mulai eksekusi playbook tanpa nanya.
- [ ] `make test-e2e-down` clean state (no orphan container, no temp dir).
- [ ] Fixture seed deterministic (`AUTO_INCREMENT` reset, `INSERT` literal ID).

## Referensi

- CONTEXT.md "App startup & lifecycle" (ADR-0022) — ephemeral port + same-dir-as-binary.
- AGENTS.md `[TOOLING_MANDATE]` — context7 mandatory untuk schema Playwright MCP.

title: E2E testing seluruh halaman via Playwright MCP
description:
## Tujuan

Bangun suite E2E test menggunakan **Playwright MCP** untuk seluruh halaman Magic MariaDB Sync (FE Next.js static-export yang di-`go:embed` ke binary Go). Suite ini dijalankan agen via Playwright MCP server (bukan CI Playwright native) untuk verifikasi visual + interaksi end-to-end di lingkungan lokal sebelum release M8.

## Scope (sesuai DECISIONS-Q1-Q60 + CONTEXT.md)

Halaman yang wajib di-cover (lihat `web/src/app/`):

1. **Dashboard / Onboarding** (`/`) — 3-card progress state machine (`hasConnections`/`hasReadyProfile`/`hasAnySession`) — CONTEXT.md First-run onboarding.
2. **Connections list** (`/connections`) — Test+Save split, badge `Belum dites`/`OK`/`Gagal` (CONTEXT.md Connection test).
3. **Profile new/builder** (`/profiles/new`) — Mapping Builder (`<Tabs>` per Dest table, `<Select>` grouped Source/Const/NULL/Default/Skip, counter "X dari Y belum diisi"), MarkReady flow (Q29 blocking modal).
4. **Session new** (`/sessions/new`) — Start sync, Closure preview dialog, Preflight banner.
5. **Session detail** — SSE progress live + Sync Log group-by-mariadb_code accordion (CONTEXT.md Sync Log UI), Cancel button → status `cancelled`.
6. **Settings / Health** — credential mode wizard lazy-prompt, retention counters, CSV bulk export.

## Cross-cutting yang harus di-verify per page

- **Q43 Adaptive viewport**: desktop ≥1024 full, tablet 768-1024 drill-down, phone <768 gate page "requires wider screen".
- **Q44 error envelope** `{error:{code,message,details}}` → **Q45 surface layers** (field/form/page/background/blocking) render benar.
- **Q46 LoadingBoundary variants** muncul saat fetch.
- **Q47 theme toggle** light/dark persist via next-themes.
- **Q48 cmdk Cmd+K** palette buka + action navigate works.
- **Q50 a11y**: focus-visible ring, keyboard nav (Tab/Arrow/Enter/Esc) di Q40 two-pane picker, Q38 log accordion, Q42 sidebar collapse, cmdk.
- **Q55 optimistic UI**: rename profile / toggle rule / update pairings → UI flip dulu, rollback toast bila server reject.
- **Q59 remote banner**: `/api/system/info.remote_exposed=true` → red banner muncul.

## Strategi

- **Tool**: Playwright MCP server (bukan `@playwright/test` di repo). Agen panggil tool `browser_navigate`, `browser_snapshot`, `browser_click`, `browser_type`, `browser_press_key` dari MCP.
- **Skenario per page** ditulis sebagai markdown playbook di `tests/playwright-mcp/<page>.md` — bukan `.spec.ts`. Format: pre-condition → langkah → assertion (DOM accessibility snapshot match).
- **Test fixture data**: 2 MariaDB instance lokal docker (Source + Destination) seed via SQL fixture di `tests/fixtures/`. Skip live MariaDB? gunakan stub HTTP backend untuk page-level interaction smoke. Pilih per child issue.
- **Run mode**: binary produksi (port ephemeral, ADR-0022) — agen jalankan `make build` → spawn binary → ambil URL dari `stderr` → feed ke `browser_navigate`. **Bukan** `bun dev` (harus uji bundle hasil `go:embed`).
- **Reporting**: hasil snapshot disimpan ke `tests/playwright-mcp/results/<timestamp>/` (gitignore). Failure → markdown report dengan accessibility tree diff.

## Acceptance criteria epic

- [ ] Semua child issue (per-page playbook) closed.
- [ ] Playbook docs lengkap di `tests/playwright-mcp/README.md` (cara agen invoke, env setup, fixture seed).
- [ ] `Makefile` target `make test-e2e` yang invoke agen Playwright MCP runner (script harness, bukan binary test).
- [ ] Smoke run pada binary build M8 candidate sukses 100% di Linux+Windows (per Q60).
- [ ] Tidak ada strings test "click(getByText)" yang bypass a11y — semua selector via accessibility role/name (Q50 alignment).

## Non-goals

- Bukan unit test (sudah covered Q51 Vitest).
- Bukan visual regression (screenshot diff) V1.
- Bukan mobile <768px interaction test (gate page only).
- Bukan macOS coverage (Q60 skip macOS V1).

## Referensi

- `CONTEXT.md` — domain terms + per-page operational notes.
- `plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` — Q29, Q38, Q40, Q42-Q50, Q55, Q59.
- `web/WEB_RULES.md` — FE rules.
- `AGENTS.md` `[TOOLING_MANDATE]` — context7 mandatory untuk Playwright MCP tool schema.

title: T1#22 — Prometheus /metrics + slog + /api/system/info + remote-bind guard
description:
# T1#22 — Prometheus `/metrics` + slog correlation + `/api/system/info` + remote-bind guard

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q57 + Q59 + T1 Amendment #22.

## Konteks

Telemetry + auth-by-bind. Single bead karena ketiganya saling silang (config loader feed semua).

## Langkah

### Bagian A — Prometheus metrics

1. **context7 wajib**:
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "prometheus client_golang" → `query-docs` "prometheus client_golang counter histogram gauge with promhttp Handler".
2. Install: `go get github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus/promhttp`.
3. File `internal/observability/metrics.go` (≤100 baris):
   - Define collectors (global var atau struct):
     - `SyncStartedTotal` — `prometheus.NewCounter(...)`.
     - `SyncFailedTotal` — counter.
     - `SseClientsActive` — `prometheus.NewGauge(...)`.
     - `HttpRequestsTotal` — counter dengan label `method`, `path_pattern`, `status_class` (`2xx`, `4xx`, `5xx`).
     - `SyncDurationSeconds` — `prometheus.NewHistogram(...)` dengan buckets default.
     - `HttpRequestDurationSeconds` — histogram dengan label `method`, `path_pattern`.
   - Register ke `prometheus.DefaultRegisterer`.
4. File `internal/observability/handler.go` (≤30 baris):
   - Ekspor `Handler() http.Handler` = `promhttp.Handler()`.
5. Wire di router (`cmd/magicsync/main.go` atau api init):
   - Mount `/metrics` ONLY kalau `config.MetricsEnabled == true`.
   - Bind ke loopback only (sama Q59 — kalau `AllowRemote == false`, metrics endpoint juga loopback).
6. Wire HTTP middleware untuk request metrics (`HttpRequestsTotal` + `HttpRequestDurationSeconds`):
   - Bungkus router dengan middleware yang record start time, call next, record status + duration.
7. Wire sync metrics di `internal/sync/`:
   - `graphify query "sync session start"` lokasi.
   - Increment `SyncStartedTotal` saat start.
   - Increment `SyncFailedTotal` saat fail.
   - Observe `SyncDurationSeconds` saat selesai.
8. SSE gauge:
   - `graphify query "SSE client connect"` lokasi.
   - Increment `SseClientsActive` on connect, decrement on disconnect.

### Bagian B — slog correlation

9. (Mostly done di T1#9 middleware correlation.) Pastikan setiap request log entry punya field `correlation_id`. Format JSON kalau `AppEnv == "prod"`, text kalau `dev`.
10. File `internal/observability/logger.go` (≤30 baris):
    - `Init(cfg *config.Config)` — set default `slog.SetDefault(...)` dengan handler sesuai env.
11. Wire di `cmd/magicsync/main.go` — call `observability.Init(cfg)` after `config.Load()`.

### Bagian C — `/api/system/info` + remote-bind guard

12. File `internal/api/system.go` (≤50 baris):
    - Handler `Info(w, r)`:
      - Read `config.Config` (inject via constructor).
      - Detect `remote_exposed`:
        - Parse `cfg.ListenAddr` host.
        - `remote_exposed = host != "127.0.0.1" && host != "localhost" && host != "::1"`.
      - Response: `{"remote_exposed": bool, "version": "...", "app_env": "..."}`.
      - Pakai Q44 envelope helper untuk error path (tidak relevan untuk handler ini — selalu 200).
13. Register route `GET /api/system/info`.

### Bagian D — Remote-bind validation

14. Update `internal/config/config.go` `Load()`:
    - Setelah baca `ListenAddr` + `AllowRemote`:
      - Parse host dari ListenAddr.
      - Jika host bukan loopback DAN `AllowRemote == false` → return error "ListenAddr must be loopback unless MAGIC_ALLOW_REMOTE=true".
      - Jika `AllowRemote == true` DAN host bukan loopback → `slog.Warn` startup banner "REMOTE ACCESS ENABLED. API NOT authenticated. Bind to 127.0.0.1 for security."
15. Tambah test config: cover allow-remote-with-non-loopback (pass), no-allow-remote-with-non-loopback (fail), loopback (pass always).

### Bagian E — FE consume system info

16. T1#17 service `systemService.info()` sudah ada. Hook `useSystemInfo()`.
17. Komponen `web/src/components/RemoteExposedBanner.tsx` (≤30 baris):
    - Pakai `useSystemInfo()`.
    - Render persistent red banner kalau `remote_exposed == true`. Pesan: "Remote access enabled. API not authenticated. Bind to 127.0.0.1 for security."
    - Pakai shadcn `<Alert variant="destructive">` atau equivalent.
18. Mount banner di `app/layout.tsx` di atas main content.

### Bagian F — Update plan/api_endpoints.md

19. Tambah `GET /api/system/info` dan `GET /metrics`.

20. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- `curl /metrics` (saat enabled) return Prometheus exposition format.
- `curl /api/system/info` return JSON dengan 3 field.
- Startup dengan `LISTEN_ADDR=0.0.0.0:8080` tanpa `MAGIC_ALLOW_REMOTE=true` → fail fast.
- Startup dengan keduanya → warning log + FE banner muncul.
- Sync session start increment counter.
- SSE connect gauge naik, disconnect turun.
- All HTTP requests punya `correlation_id` di log.

## Tooling

- context7: prometheus client_golang.
- graphify: discover sync start + SSE connect points.

## Dependency

Blocked by T1#9 (middleware correlation), T1#17 (FE service), T1#19 (config loader).
acceptance_criteria: curl /metrics return Prometheus format saat enabled; /api/system/info return 3 field; startup 0.0.0.0 tanpa allow-remote fail fast; FE banner muncul saat remote_exposed; sync counters increment; SSE gauge naik turun; HTTP log correlation_id.

title: T1#20 — SWR optimistic mutations (safe ops)
description:
# T1#20 — SWR optimistic mutations untuk safe operations

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q55 + T1 Amendment #20.

## Konteks

Optimistic UI untuk: `useRenameProfile`, `useToggleRule`, `useUpdatePairings`. Server-confirmed untuk delete, markReady, startSync, applyRule.

## Langkah

1. **context7 wajib**:
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "swr" → `query-docs` "SWR mutate optimisticData rollbackOnError pattern".
2. Implementasi (lokasi: `web/src/hooks/`):
   - **`useRenameProfile.ts`**:
     - Input: `profileId`.
     - Return: `{rename: (newName: string) => Promise<void>}`.
     - Logic: panggil `mutate(profilesKey, (old) => updateProfileName(old, profileId, newName), {optimisticData: ..., rollbackOnError: true, revalidate: true})` + call `profileService.update(profileId, {name: newName})`.
     - On error: toast (Q45 background) "Update gagal, dibatalkan" via `sonner`.
   - **`useToggleRule.ts`**:
     - Input: `profileId`, `ruleId`.
     - Toggle `rule.enabled` boolean optimistically.
     - Service call: `profileService.updatePairings` atau dedicated `toggleRule` endpoint.
   - **`useUpdatePairings.ts`**:
     - Input: `profileId`.
     - Return: `{update: (pairings: ColumnPairing[]) => Promise<void>}`.
     - Optimistic merge pairings ke cached profile.
     - Service: `profileService.updatePairings`.
     - **PENTING**: T1#7 auto-downgrade — kalau response `downgraded_from` ada, fire toast info "Profile diturunkan ke draft".
3. **Tidak optimistic** (plain mutation + button spinner via T1#11):
   - `useDeleteConnection.ts` — confirm dialog dulu, lalu `connectionService.delete(id, {cascade})`.
   - `useMarkReady.ts` — modal preflight (Q29) dulu, lalu `profileService.markReady(id)`.
   - `useStartSync.ts` — `sessionService.start(profileId)`.
   - `useApplyRule.ts` — service call + revalidate.
4. Pattern shared: helper `web/src/hooks/_mutationHelpers.ts` (≤50 baris) — `withErrorToast(fn)` wrapper kalau pola repetitif.
5. Test Vitest (T1#16):
   - `useRenameProfile`: mock service, render hook via `renderHook`, call `rename`, assert SWR cache mutated, assert service called.
   - Error path: mock service throw, assert rollback + toast call.
6. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- 3 optimistic hooks bekerja: UI update instan, server confirm di background, rollback + toast on error.
- 4 server-confirmed hooks bekerja: button spinner saat pending, full reload state on success.
- Vitest unit test per hook minimal 2 case (success + error).

## Tooling

- context7: SWR optimistic.

## Dependency

Blocked by T1#17 (services).
acceptance_criteria: 3 optimistic hooks instan + rollback toast on error; 4 server-confirmed hooks button spinner + full reload; Vitest 2+ case per hook.

title: T1#18 — Makefile orchestration + embed-check
description:
# T1#18 — Makefile orchestration + `embed-check`

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q53 + T1 Amendment #18.

## Konteks

Build pipeline orchestrated via Makefile. `embed-check` mencegah ship stale FE bundle.

## Langkah

1. Verifikasi `make` tersedia (POSIX standard, tidak butuh install).
2. **context7 boleh skip** (Makefile = standard syntax, bukan lib).
3. File `Makefile` di root (≤80 baris):
   - Target `help` (default) — print list target.
   - Target `dev-web`: `cd web && bun dev`.
   - Target `dev-go`: pakai `air` kalau ada (`.air.toml` di repo?). Fallback: `go run ./cmd/magicsync`.
   - Target `dev`: chain `dev-web` + `dev-go` di background dengan `&` + `wait`. **Catatan**: kalau dual-terminal lebih simple, dokumentasikan di README dan target `dev` cukup hint "run dev-web + dev-go in separate terminals".
   - Target `build-web`: `cd web && bun run build` → produce `web/out/`.
   - Target `build-go`: `go build -ldflags "-s -w" -o magicsync ./cmd/magicsync`.
   - Target `build`: `build-web` → `build-go` (sequential).
   - Target `embed-check`: shell logic compare mtime:
     - Newest file di `web/src/**`: `find web/src -type f -printf '%T@\n' | sort -nr | head -1`.
     - Mtime `web/out/index.html`: `stat -c '%Y' web/out/index.html`.
     - Jika newest src > out → `echo "FE bundle stale. Run 'make build-web' first." && exit 1`.
   - Target `test`: `go test -race ./... && cd web && bun run test`.
   - Target `clean`: `rm -rf web/out web/.next magicsync`.
4. File `.air.toml` (optional, kalau Go hot-reload diinginkan):
   - **context7 skip** (config standard, dokumentasi minimal di internet).
   - Atau skip total — pakai `go run` polling manual.
5. Update `README.md` section "Development":
   - Document `make dev`, `make build`, `make test`, `make clean`.
   - Catat `embed-check` jalan otomatis di CI.
6. CI config (kalau ada `.github/workflows/*.yml` atau `.gitlab-ci.yml`):
   - Tambah step `make embed-check && make build && make test`.
   - Kalau belum ada CI: SKIP, dokumentasikan di README "CI: run `make embed-check && make build && make test`".
7. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- `make build` produce `magicsync` binary + `web/out/` static.
- `make embed-check` exit 1 jika `web/src/` lebih baru dari `web/out/index.html`.
- `make test` jalan keduanya BE + FE.
- README documented.

## Tooling

- context7: skip.

## Dependency

Tidak ada blocker. Bisa parallel.
acceptance_criteria: make build produce magicsync binary + web/out static; make embed-check exit 1 saat stale; make test jalan BE + FE; README documented.

# T1#14 — Forms react-hook-form + zod via shadcn Form block

Standardisasi form: RHF + Zod + shadcn `<Form>`. Server error mapping via `useFormError` (T1#10).

## Langkah

1. **context7 wajib**:
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "react-hook-form" → `query-docs` "react-hook-form v7 with zod resolver setError pattern".
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "zod" → `query-docs` "Zod object schema with refine and Indonesian message".

3. Add shadcn form: `bunx shadcn add form` (juga bawa `label`, `input` kalau belum).

   - **File pattern**: per form, schema `*.schema.ts` colocated dengan komponen:
     - `app/connections/_components/ConnectionForm.tsx` (komponen, ≤100 baris).
     - `app/connections/_components/ConnectionForm.schema.ts` (zod schema, ≤50 baris).
   - **Schema export pattern**: `export const connectionSchema = z.object({...})` + `export type ConnectionFormValues = z.infer<typeof connectionSchema>`.
   - **Form hook**: `useForm<ConnectionFormValues>({resolver: zodResolver(connectionSchema), defaultValues: {...}})`.

   - Stack: RHF + Zod + shadcn Form.

   - Server error → `useFormError`.
   - Backend Go validation = source of truth, Zod = mirror UX.

description:
# T1#13 — Command palette `cmdk` + action registry

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q48 + T1 Amendment #13.

## Konteks

Command palette only (no global data search). Cmd+K trigger, action registry di `lib/commands.ts`.

## Konteks

Dual theme: light + dark, system default, manual toggle (sun/moon header). Tailwind v4 zero-config pakai `@variant dark` + dual CSS var sets di `@theme`. `DESIGN.md` saat ini hanya define light palette — wajib di-extend.

3. **Provider**: edit `web/src/app/layout.tsx`:

   - Section `@theme` (Tailwind v4) — define light tokens (sudah ada dari shadcn init).
   - Tambah section `.dark { --background: ...; --foreground: ...; ... }` (atau pakai `@variant` per Tailwind v4 docs).

   - Pakai `useTheme()` dari `next-themes`.
   - Render `<Button variant="ghost" size="icon">` dengan icon lucide `Sun`/`Moon`. Animate transition.

# T1#10 — FE error surface layering (`lib/errorSurface.ts` + hooks)

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q45 + T1 Amendment #10. Bergantung pada T1#17 (apiClient → ApiError).

## Konteks

FE error surface harus layered: field (inline), form (banner), page (empty-state retry), background (toast), blocking (modal). Centralized di satu tempat agar mapping `error.code → surface` konsisten.

## Langkah

1. **context7 wajib** sebelum tulis kode:
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "sonner" (toast lib pilihan). `query-docs` "Sonner toast React API showError pattern".

2. File `web/src/lib/errorSurface.ts` (≤100 baris):
   - Ekspor type `SurfaceLayer = 'field' | 'form' | 'page' | 'background' | 'blocking'`.
   - Ekspor func `classifyError(err: ApiError): SurfaceLayer` — mapping default berdasar `err.code` + `err.status`:
     - `VALIDATION_FAILED` + `details.fields` ada → `field`.
     - `VALIDATION_FAILED` tanpa fields → `form`.
     - 5xx → `page` atau `background` (lihat context call).
     - `CONFLICT_RUNNING_SESSION` → `blocking`.
     - `NOT_FOUND` → `page`.
     - Default → `background`.
   - Ekspor func `surfaceError(err, opts: {layer?, formApi?, setBanner?})` — dispatch ke surface yang dipilih (atau auto-classify).
3. File `web/src/hooks/useFormError.ts` (≤50 baris):
   - Hook menerima `react-hook-form` form instance.
   - Method `apply(err: ApiError)`: jika `err.details.fields[]` → loop, call `form.setError(field, {message})`. Kalau tidak, set banner state.
   - Return `{banner: string | null, apply, clear}`.
4. File `web/src/hooks/usePageError.ts` (≤50 baris):
   - Hook return `{error: ApiError | null, set, clear, retry}`.
   - Wajib expose untuk `<PageError>` komponen (komponen UI di bead lain).

- `useFormError.apply(err)` set field errors atau banner sesuai shape.
- Unit test cover 5+ case.

- context7: `sonner` API.
- graphify: tidak banyak (file baru).

title: T1#7 — UpdatePairings auto-set status draft
description:
# T1#7 — UpdatePairings auto-set status `draft` saat mutate ready/active

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → T1 Amendment #7.

## Konteks

Profile state machine: `draft → ready → active`. Saat profile `ready` atau `active` lalu user mutate `column_pairings_json`/`rules_json`, profile harus DOWNGRADE ke `draft` (re-validate via MarkReady lagi). FE sudah punya konfirmasi modal sebelum POST. Backend wajib enforce.

## Langkah

1. `graphify query "UpdatePairings handler"` lokasi `internal/api/profiles.go`.
2. Verifikasi behavior existing:
   - Apakah sudah auto-set `draft`? Kalau ya, hanya tambah field warning di response.
   - Kalau belum, modifikasi.
3. Logic:
   - Step 1: Load profile current. Capture `prev_status`.
   - Step 2: Update `column_pairings_json` + `rules_json`.
   - Step 3: Jika `prev_status` ∈ {`ready`, `active`} → set status `draft` di DB.
   - Step 4: Return body `{"profile": {...}, "downgraded_from": "ready" | "active" | null}`. Jika `downgraded_from != null` → FE tampilkan toast info (Q45 background).
4. Atomic: ketiga update di satu transaction.
5. **Status `active` jangan auto-downgrade** kalau ada SyncSession running yang pakai profile ini — return 409 instead. Cek via `repo.SessionsRepo.ActiveByProfile(id)`. (Skenario: sync sedang jalan, jangan biarkan pairings berubah mid-sync.)
6. Test handler 4 skenario: draft→draft (no downgrade), ready→draft, active→draft (no running session), active+running session → 409.
7. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- PUT pairings di `ready` → status jadi `draft`, response `downgraded_from: "ready"`.
- PUT pairings di `active` (no running session) → status jadi `draft`, response `downgraded_from: "active"`.
- PUT pairings di `active` (with running session) → 409.
- PUT pairings di `draft` → no downgrade, `downgraded_from: null`.

## Tooling

- graphify.
- Tidak butuh context7.

## Dependency

Blocked by T1#9.
acceptance_criteria: PUT pairings di ready → draft + downgraded_from response; di active no running → draft; di active + running session → 409; di draft → no downgrade.

title: T1#5 — Connection Delete cascade + ref + running-session guard
description:
# T1#5 — Connection Delete cascade flag + reference + running-session guard

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → T1 Amendment #5.

## Konteks

`internal/api/connections.go` `Delete` (line 151-158) saat ini naive `repo.Delete(id)` tanpa cek referensi. Konsekuensi: bisa orphan-kan mapping profiles atau interrupt running sync.

Keputusan:
- Jika ada running session pakai connection → return 409 dengan list active sessions.
- Jika hanya profile reference (no running session) → require `?cascade=true`, hapus profiles + connection atomic.
- Tanpa `?cascade` dan ada referensi → return 409 dengan list referencing profiles.

## Langkah

1. `graphify query "sync_sessions table query"` lokasi repo session.
2. `graphify query "mapping_profiles table"` lokasi repo profiles.
3. Tambah repo helper:
   - `repo.SessionsRepo.ActiveByConnection(connID) ([]Session, error)` — return sessions dengan status `running`/`paused` (sesuai status enum 5-nilai).
   - `repo.ProfilesRepo.ByConnection(connID) ([]Profile, error)` — return profiles yang reference connection (source_id atau dest_id).
4. Modifikasi handler `Delete`:
   - Step 1: cek `ActiveByConnection`. Kalau non-empty → `WriteError(w, "CONFLICT_RUNNING_SESSION", "Cannot delete: active sync sessions exist", map[string]any{"active_sessions": [...]}, 409)`.
   - Step 2: cek `ByConnection`. Kalau non-empty AND `r.URL.Query().Get("cascade") != "true"` → `WriteError(w, "CONFLICT_REFERENCED", "Cannot delete: profiles reference this connection", map[string]any{"profiles": [...]}, 409)`.
   - Step 3: kalau `cascade=true` → repo transaction: delete profiles + delete connection atomic.
   - Step 4: kalau no references → delete langsung.
5. Repo transaction: pakai `db.BeginTx` / wrapper existing di `internal/repo/`.
6. Dependency: butuh T1#9 (`WriteError` helper) **selesai dulu**. Buat dependency link `bd link <this> blocks <T1#9>` (reverse: blocked-by).
7. Test handler 4 skenario.
8. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- DELETE conn dengan active session → 409 + active_sessions di details.
- DELETE conn dengan profile ref tanpa `?cascade` → 409 + profiles di details.
- DELETE conn dengan `?cascade=true` → 204 + profiles ikut terhapus.
- DELETE conn tanpa ref → 204.
- Atomic: failure mid-cascade → rollback.

## Tooling

- graphify.
- Tidak butuh context7.

## Dependency

Blocked by T1#9 (WriteError helper).
acceptance_criteria: DELETE conn active session → 409 + active_sessions; DELETE conn profile ref tanpa cascade → 409 + profiles; DELETE conn dengan cascade=true → 204 + profiles terhapus; tanpa ref → 204; atomic.

# T1#4 — Connection GET omit `PasswordCiphertext`, return `has_password`

Saat ini `internal/api/connections.go` `Get` (line 80-92) marshal `repo.Connection` langsung yang include `PasswordCiphertext`. Risiko leak ciphertext via API. Keputusan: shape API connection = `{id, name, host, port, user, has_password: bool, last_test_status, last_test_error}`.

## Langkah

1. `graphify query "repo Connection struct"` lokasi struct.
2. **Pilihan implementasi** (pilih yang lebih clean):
   - **A**: Tambah custom `MarshalJSON` di `repo.Connection` yang skip ciphertext dan compute `has_password = len(PasswordCiphertext) > 0`.
   - **B**: Buat DTO terpisah `api.ConnectionResponse` di `internal/api/` + helper `toResponse(*repo.Connection) ConnectionResponse`. Lebih eksplisit + memisahkan concern.
   - **Rekomendasi: B** (lebih sesuai aturan 1 struct/file + memisahkan transport shape dari persistence shape).
3. Refactor handler `List` + `Get` + `Create` + `Update` agar response pakai DTO ini.
4. Pastikan field `has_password` true saat `PasswordCiphertext != ""`.
5. Update FE service signature di T1#17 — typed `Connection` di FE mirror DTO ini.
6. Test handler — assert ciphertext tidak muncul di JSON output.
7. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- GET `/api/connections/{id}` JSON response **tidak punya** field `password_ciphertext`.
- Field `has_password: boolean` ada.
- Test handler verifikasi shape.
- LIST endpoint pun pakai DTO.

## Tooling

- graphify.
- Tidak butuh context7.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/connections/{id} response tidak punya field password_ciphertext; has_password boolean ada; test handler verifikasi shape; LIST pakai DTO.

7. Test integration: pastikan `cmd/magicsync` start tanpa error route conflict.
8. Jalankan `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- Endpoint `GET /api/sse/{id}` melayani SSE stream session.
- Path lama 404 (bukan dual-serve).
- `plan/api_endpoints.md` + `web/WEB_RULES.md` selaras.
- `go test -race ./internal/sse/...` pass.

## Tooling

- graphify: lokasi router.
- Tidak butuh context7 (bukan lib API).
acceptance_criteria: Endpoint GET /api/sse/{id} melayani SSE stream session; path lama 404; plan/api_endpoints.md + web/WEB_RULES.md selaras; go test -race ./internal/sse/... pass.

title: Distribution build pipeline (linux amd64+arm64, windows amd64)
description: V1 rilis untuk **linux/amd64 + linux/arm64 + windows/amd64**, **macOS skip** (Apple Developer Program prematur, Gatekeeper friction; lihat ADR-0021). Cross-compile manual via scripts/release.sh vX.Y.Z di mesin dev (loop GOOS/GOARCH ~15 baris, output ke dist/), upload ke GitHub Release pakai 'gh release create vX.Y.Z dist/* --notes-file CHANGELOG.md'. **Versioning SemVer longgar** mulai v0.1.0 (per milestone progress) sampai v1.0.0 (semua slice lulus + smoke 3-target); pre-1.0 breaking change schema SQLite / profile JSON boleh tanpa MAJOR bump (V1 belum janji stabilitas). Versi di-inject via -ldflags '-X main.version=$VERSION', di-expose lewat GET /api/version + UI Settings/About. **CHANGELOG.md** format Keep a Changelog Bahasa Indonesia audience user akhir (mis. 'Tambah dukungan Sync Session yang bisa dibatalkan', bukan istilah teknis ADR); gh release membaca section terbaru. Flow rilis manual: edit CHANGELOG.md → git tag vX.Y.Z → git push --tags → ./scripts/release.sh vX.Y.Z → gh release create. **Tidak ada GitHub Actions V1**. Binary unsigned: Linux nihil friction, Windows SmartScreen 'More info → Run anyway' didokumentasikan di README dengan 2 screenshot bahasa awam (tidak menyebut 'code signing' / 'EV cert'). Landing page badge platform + catatan ramah 'macOS akan didukung versi mendatang, sementara bisa via Docker/Lima'. -ldflags '-s -w' cukup; **tidak pakai UPX** (trigger AV false positive Windows Defender). Smoke test 3 target sebelum tag.

title: Retention via capacity + incremental vacuum + Settings/Health page
description: **V1 retention berbasis capacity, bukan waktu** (override CLAUDE.md/PRD legacy 30-day). sync_logs cap 500.000 row (high) / 400.000 (low); sync_sessions cap 10.000 / 9.000. Eviction oldest-first via id ASC LIMIT N (autoincrement = proxy waktu, hemat index). Trigger: post-write async dari runner setelah rows_failed naik + time.Ticker 1 jam di internal/maint/retention.go sebagai safety net. **PRAGMA incremental_vacuum(N)** dipanggil setelah setiap eviction batch — tanpa ini file tidak shrink dan retensi gagal mencapai tujuannya (auto_vacuum=INCREMENTAL sudah di-set di 001_init.sql per slice migrations). CASCADE: session ter-evict ikut menghapus sync_logs milik session tsb (termasuk profile_snapshot_json-nya). **Export log CSV wajib disediakan** sebelum eviction manual: per-session di Sync Session detail + bulk di Settings/Health page; tombol manual 'Bersihkan log lama' **di-block** sampai user klik export atau eksplisit confirm. Tidak ada export otomatis. UI Settings/Health page menampilkan counter (sync_logs count, sync_sessions count) dan ukuran DB (page_count × page_size) sebagai transparansi pengganti kontrol konfigurasi. Tombol 'Bersihkan log lama' (manual eviction trigger). Bulk CSV export semua session. Test boundary: 499.999/500.001 row + post-vacuum page_count reduction + CSV round-trip (UTF-8 BOM untuk Excel Windows).

Test: ticker safety net (mock time.Now / inject)

title: Sync Run UI page (start/progress/cancel)
description: UI Sync Run flow per CONTEXT decisions. **Start trigger di Mapping Profile detail page** (tombol 'Mulai Sync' hanya muncul di profile status='ready'); klik trigger preflight → kalau lulus, POST /api/sessions, redirect ke /sessions/{id}. **Progress display: top-level counters only** (simpler implementation per chosen approach): '{processed}/{total} baris · {failed} gagal · sedang: {current_table}' + global progress bar tunggal (percentage = processed/total). Tidak ada per-table accordion (breakdown failures sudah ditangani oleh Sync Log UI slice terpisah). **Cancel button = primary action slot replace Start saat running** — tombol berubah dari 'Mulai Sync' → 'Batalkan' (destructive variant) saat status running; spinner 'Membatalkan…' antara klik dan SSE cancelled event. **Post-done behavior: auto-redirect ke /sessions/{id} detail page** (sudah di sana actually karena trigger redirect sebelumnya — di-update view ke 'completed state' dengan summary). web/lib/sse.ts: wrapper EventSource dengan auto-reconnect (exponential backoff 1s/2s/4s, max 30s), parse event types, emit ke React state. Loading skeleton, empty state (no session), error toast saat 409 conflict (single-session lock) atau preflight blocking. title: SSE broker + progress/row_failed/done/cancelled events
description: internal/sse/broker.go: hub subscriber per sessionID. Channel buffered, drop slow client. internal/sse/events.go: tipe event (progress, row_failed, done, cancelled, error). GET /api/sessions/{id}/events Server-Sent Events stream: kirim 'snapshot' event (current counts dari sync_sessions + last 50 row failures dari sync_logs) saat connect, lalu live stream progress/row_failed/done/cancelled/error. **Tidak ada replay buffer** — source of truth = sync_sessions (counts di-update per chunk-commit *sebelum* publish event) + sync_logs. Reconnect / refresh tab = snapshot baru. Header Last-Event-ID **diabaikan** V1. Runner publish ke broker setelah commit chunk. Race detector tests wajib.

title: Per-row error → ToFriendly + sync_logs
description: internal/sync/errors.go: ToFriendly(mysqlErr) (userMsg, technicalMsg). Lookup berdasar MariaDB error code + parser regex untuk extract konteks (nama kolom, nilai, constraint) ke template Bahasa Indonesia. **Whitelist V1**: 1048 (column cannot be null), 1062 (duplicate entry — UNIQUE non-PK), 1264 (out of range), 1292 (incorrect value), 1366 (incorrect string value), 1406 (data too long), 1452 (FK constraint fail) — semua row errors. Connection errors **2002/2003/2006/2013** → SSE error event, **bukan** row log. Fallback generic untuk kode di luar whitelist. **1366 emoji hint**: pattern matching hex prefix \xF0\x9F (4-byte UTF-8 leading = emoji/supplementary plane) → friendly hint 'Nilai mengandung karakter khusus (emoji atau aksara non-Latin) yang tidak didukung kolom Destination. Minta admin Destination ubah charset kolom ke utf8mb4 dengan ALTER TABLE {tabel} CONVERT TO CHARACTER SET utf8mb4'. Generic 1366 → existing template. Identifier code English, message BI; no i18n V1. sync_logs table: id, session_id (FK CASCADE), destination_table, pk_json, problem_column, source_value, mariadb_code, technical_msg, friendly_msg, created_at. Runner connect logHook callback dari upsert slice ke ToFriendly + repo.Logs.Insert. AUTO_INCREMENT collision (1062 UNIQUE non-PK seperti email) template per CONTEXT: 'Baris bertabrakan dengan data yang sudah ada di Destination pada kolom unik {key} (nilai {val}). Kemungkinan ada baris di Destination yang bukan berasal dari Source'.

005_sync_logs.sql migration (FK CASCADE ke sync_sessions)

internal/repo/logs.go Insert + ListBySession + CountByCode
Runner logHook bridge upsert per-row error → ToFriendly → repo.Logs.Insert
Test: setiap whitelist code → friendly message dengan placeholder ter-extract
Test: emoji byte pattern → emoji hint, non-emoji 1366 → generic
Test: connection error tidak masuk sync_logs
Test: pk_json composite ter-serialize benar
File ≤120 baris (split errors.go + templates.go)

title: Cooperative Cancel (chunk-boundary)
description: POST /api/sessions/{id}/cancel idempotent → trigger context.Cancel() di runner. **Cooperative cancel di chunk boundary** per ADR-0003: chunk yang sudah BEGIN selalu commit penuh. Cancel hanya mencegah fetch chunk berikutnya, bukan abort transaksi yang sedang ter-execute. **Tidak ada tx.Rollback() path** di runner V1; chunk in-flight selesai normal (commit atau row-level error log), runner exit loop saat ctx.Err() != nil sebelum SELECT chunk berikutnya. Latency Cancel = sisa durasi chunk in-flight (~ratusan ms–detik). Status final = 'cancelled' (beda semantik dari 'interrupted' = system event connection drop / app crash, dan 'failed' = hard error). **Tidak ada rollback**: baris yang sudah ter-commit di Destination tetap ada (Source-wins UPSERT + chunk autocommit). UI: tombol Cancel mid-sync, spinner 'Membatalkan…' antara klik dan SSE cancelled event, badge netral + pesan '{processed} baris sudah masuk Destination, hapus manual jika perlu'.
acceptance_criteria:
POST /api/sessions/{id}/cancel idempotent (multiple call = no-op)
context.Cancel() trigger di runner
Chunk in-flight commit normal (no Rollback)
ctx.Err() check **sebelum** SELECT chunk berikutnya
Status update ke 'cancelled' setelah loop exit
SSE event 'cancelled' payload {processed, failed, cancelled_at}
UI tombol Cancel mid-sync, spinner 'Membatalkan…'
UI status final: badge netral + pesan {processed} baris masuk Destination
Test: cancel mid-chunk → chunk commit normal → status cancelled
Test: cancel sebelum chunk berikut → no extra fetch
Test: cancel idempotent (2x call OK)
Race detector ON

title: Sync runner + session lifecycle + global single-session lock
description: internal/sync/runner.go orchestrate per-session sync. sync_sessions table dengan kolom: id, profile_id, profile_snapshot_json (frozen {selection, rules, source_connection_id, destination_connection_id, profile_id} saat session start; credentials NOT snapshot — di-decrypt runtime), status enum **running | done | interrupted | failed | cancelled**, started_at, ended_at, rows_processed, rows_failed, current_table. title: Whole-table chunked Source-wins UPSERT
description: internal/sync/upsert.go: **Whole-table mode** — SELECT * dari Source untuk seluruh tabel di Selection Set (closed under FK via Closure Advisor), upsert ke Destination dalam chunked batch **500–1000 baris**. INSERT ... ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE dengan PK eksplisit dari Source (preserve PK, AUTO_INCREMENT Destination diabaikan). UPDATE branch hanya menyentuh kolom yang di-pair (Skip = tidak masuk INSERT list dan UPDATE clause; Default DB = INSERT DEFAULT + UPDATE col=DEFAULT(col); Kosongkan/NULL = INSERT NULL + UPDATE col=NULL; Konstanta = literal value; Source column = Source value; Rule = transformed value via internal/rules). Eksekusi dalam topological order (parents dulu) dari closure_advisor output. Belum ada session lifecycle / SSE / cancel di slice ini — function murni input(profile, source schema, dest schema, conn pair) → result counts. Per-row failure di-log via callback (logHook func) yang slice berikutnya hubungkan ke sync_logs.

title: Preflight (schema drift detection both sides)
description: internal/sync/preflight.go: hybrid pre-flight struktural + runtime type, **berlaku Source + Destination**. Saat user klik Start, re-introspect kedua DB dan diff terhadap snapshot kolom di mapping_profiles.selection_json (per tabel: {name, is_pk, is_paired, side}, tanpa tipe). **Blocking Destination**: paired column missing, PK column missing/berubah, table missing, kolom baru NOT NULL tanpa DEFAULT, kolom dengan opsi 'Default DB' kehilangan DEFAULT-nya. **Blocking Source**: paired Source column missing (rename/drop) — pesan 'Kolom Source {tabel}.{kolom} tidak ditemukan. Mungkin telah di-rename atau dihapus. Buka Mapping Profile dan pilih ulang sumber kolom.', Source table missing. **Auto-handled Destination**: kolom baru nullable, kolom baru dengan DEFAULT, type widened. **Auto-handled Source**: kolom baru tidak referenced di Pairing → skip. Type narrowed (VARCHAR(100)→20, INT→SMALLINT) **tidak** ditangkap pre-flight V1 — runtime per-baris via 1406/1264/1366. **Tidak ada heuristik rename detection** — user explicit pilih ulang di Builder. Pesan via ToFriendlyDrift (jalur terpisah dari ToFriendly row-formatter), banner pre-start. Tidak ada flag bypass V1. Asumsi profile sudah 'ready' (validator structural sudah lulus di builder layer; preflight fokus drift, tidak ulangi).

title: Closure Advisor (compile-time FK closure expansion)
description: internal/sync/closure.go: hitung Dependency Closure dari Selection Set memakai **dual-side FK** (gabungan FK Source schema ∪ FK Destination schema) — supaya skenario 'Destination punya FK yang Source tidak punya' tidak meledak runtime. Closure di-jalankan dua kali per CONTEXT: (1) saat user simpan profile sebagai 'ready' — selection_json di-freeze dengan role per tabel ({name, role: 'user_selected' | 'advisor_added'}); (2) saat user klik Start — re-introspect, hitung ulang, deteksi schema drift (drift detection slice terpisah). title: Credential mode wizard + AES-GCM key provider
description: internal/crypto/ KeyProvider interface dengan dua impl: (a) OS keystore via go-keyring, (b) passphrase user + Argon2id KDF. Mode dipilih di dedicated route /onboarding/keamanan (bukan modal), disimpan di app_settings.key_mode (os_keystore | passphrase). Wizard muncul lazy saat user pertama klik 'Tambah Koneksi' — redirect ke route wizard kalau key_mode belum di-set, kembali ke form connection setelah selesai. Copy awam: 'Komputer ini hanya saya pakai sendiri' → keystore, 'Saya bawa di USB / komputer berganti-ganti' → passphrase. Detail teknis di collapsible. **Passphrase: minimum 5 karakter, tanpa wajib digit/mixedcase (V1 simplification).** Mode passphrase mewajibkan checkbox 'Saya sudah simpan passphrase di tempat aman, lupa = data hilang permanen' sebelum Lanjut aktif. **Unlock cadence: sekali per app launch** — passphrase di-prompt saat first credential read, di-decrypt ke in-memory cache, valid until process exit. Salt + KDF params di app_settings, ciphertext+nonce di connections.password_ciphertext. Probe keystore gagal di Linux tanpa keyring → fallback dialog ke passphrase. Re-key flow di Settings/Keamanan: satu transaksi (decrypt-old → encrypt-new → update key_mode), rollback atomic. Smoke test: drop binary di folder kosong, jalankan, browser terbuka

title: T1#21 — Link prefetch=false di heavy routes + heuristic docs
description:
# T1#21 — `<Link prefetch={false}>` di heavy routes + heuristic docs

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q56 + T1 Amendment #21.

## Konteks

Default auto-prefetch (Next.js App Router). Opt-out untuk session detail (Q38 log+drift) dan profile detail/builder (Q40 schema tree).

## Langkah

1. **context7 wajib**:
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "next.js" → `query-docs` "Next.js 16 App Router Link prefetch static export behavior".
   - Validasi: behavior `prefetch={false}` di static export sama dengan dynamic.
2. Identifikasi semua `<Link href="/sessions/[id]">` + `<Link href="/profiles/[id]">` + `<Link href="/profiles/[id]/builder">`:
   - `graphify query "Link href sessions"` + serupa untuk profiles.
   - Lokasi prediksi: `app/sessions/_components/*`, `app/profiles/_components/*`, `components/Sidebar*`.
3. Tambah `prefetch={false}` di semua link yang masuk ke route detail tersebut.
4. **Tidak** opt-out di list page entry (`/sessions`, `/profiles`) atau settings.
5. Update `web/WEB_RULES.md` section baru "Route prefetch" (setelah "State management"):
   - Default auto-prefetch.
   - Opt-out untuk route dengan static payload >50KB atau revalidate-on-mount.
   - Daftar route yang opt-out di V1: session detail, profile detail, profile builder.
   - **Tidak ada** custom hover-prefetch (alasannya: keyboard a11y Q50).
6. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- Grep `<Link href="/sessions/` di FE → semua match punya `prefetch={false}`.
- Grep `<Link href="/profiles/` di FE → semua match ke detail/builder punya `prefetch={false}` (list link OK default).
- WEB_RULES.md section "Route prefetch" eksis.

## Tooling

- context7: Next.js Link prefetch.
- graphify: search Link usage.

## Dependency

Tidak ada blocker. Setelah ada Link consumer (bead UI scaffolding).
acceptance_criteria: Grep Link href sessions/ → semua ada prefetch=false; profiles detail/builder ada prefetch=false; WEB_RULES.md Route prefetch section eksis.

title: T1#15 — axe-core dev + keyboard nav docs + kontras audit
description:
# T1#15 — `@axe-core/react` dev + keyboard nav coverage + kontras audit

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q50 + T1 Amendment #15.

## Konteks

Target WCAG AA. Axe core dev-only auto-audit. Keyboard nav manual coverage untuk 4 komponen kritis. Kontras audit dual mode.

## Langkah

1. **context7 wajib**:
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "axe-core" → `query-docs` "@axe-core/react integration with Next.js 16 development mode only".
2. Install: `cd web && bun add -D @axe-core/react react-dom`.
3. File `web/src/lib/a11y.ts` (≤30 baris):
   - Conditional import: `if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') { import('@axe-core/react').then((axe) => axe.default(React, ReactDOM, 1000)) }`.
   - Pattern dari context7 docs.
4. Wire di `app/layout.tsx` — call setup di top-level `useEffect` atau di `instrumentation.ts` (Next.js 16).
5. **Keyboard nav checklist** (manual test, dokumen `web/docs/A11Y_KEYBOARD.md` — buat baru):
   - **Q40 schema picker two-pane**:
     - Tab masuk pane kiri (table list) → fokus row pertama.
     - Arrow up/down navigate row.
     - Enter → buka detail di pane kanan, fokus berpindah ke detail.
     - Tab di pane kanan navigate field.
     - Shift+Tab balik ke pane kiri.
   - **Q38 log viewer**:
     - Tab masuk list log entries.
     - Space toggle accordion (group-by mariadb_code).
     - Arrow up/down navigate.
   - **Q42 sidebar**:
     - Tab masuk → fokus link pertama.
     - Enter open, Esc close (kalau collapse).
     - Arrow navigate antar link.
   - **Q48 cmdk**:
     - Cmd+K buka.
     - Esc tutup.
     - Arrow navigate.
     - Enter select.
   - File ini = template, agent UI akan isi result setelah implementasi.
6. **Kontras audit** (dokumen `web/docs/A11Y_CONTRAST.md` — buat baru):
   - Tabel: token name, light hex, dark hex, ratio (text), ratio (UI), pass AA?.
   - Hitung pakai WebAIM contrast tool (manual) atau scripting (optional bead V2).
   - Minimum: text 4.5:1, UI 3:1.
7. Update `web/WEB_RULES.md` section "A11y MUST" → tambah:
   - `@axe-core/react` dev audit aktif.
   - Reference ke `A11Y_KEYBOARD.md` + `A11Y_CONTRAST.md`.
8. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- `bun run dev` → console log axe violations (kalau ada).
- `web/docs/A11Y_KEYBOARD.md` eksis dengan 4 checklist (template kosong OK di issue ini, isi result di issue downstream).
- `web/docs/A11Y_CONTRAST.md` eksis dengan tabel (boleh kosong row, struktur kolom benar).
- `web/WEB_RULES.md` section A11y di-update.
- **No CI gate** (per Q50).

## Tooling

- context7: @axe-core/react.

## Dependency

Best bareng T1#12 (themes — kontras butuh dual palette).
acceptance_criteria: bun run dev console log axe violations; A11Y_KEYBOARD.md + A11Y_CONTRAST.md eksis (boleh kosong row); WEB_RULES.md A11y section updated; no CI gate.

title: T1#8 — web/WEB_RULES.md viewport policy section
description:
# T1#8 — Tambah viewport policy section ke `web/WEB_RULES.md`

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q43 + T1 Amendment #8.

## Konteks

Q43 lock: adaptive viewport (desktop full, tablet collapse, phone gate). `web/WEB_RULES.md` saat ini punya satu kalimat tentang responsive di section "A11y MUST" (`Mapping Builder boleh horizontal scroll di <1024px`) yang tidak menjelaskan kebijakan phone-gate.

## Langkah

1. Baca section "A11y MUST" + "Struktur folder" `web/WEB_RULES.md`.
2. Tambah section baru "Viewport policy" SETELAH section "A11y MUST", isi (prose Indonesian):
   - Definisi 3 breakpoint: phone <768px, tablet 768-1024px, desktop ≥1024px.
   - Aturan phone: page gate full-screen pesan "Magic MariaDB Sync membutuhkan layar lebih lebar. Gunakan tablet atau desktop." Komponen: `<ViewportGate>` di root `app/layout.tsx`, menggunakan media query CSS-only (Tailwind `lg:hidden` reverse pattern + JS untuk redirect-prevention).
   - Aturan tablet: sidebar (Q42) → hamburger menu (shadcn `Sheet`). Two-pane Q40 → drill-down (master list visible, detail = new screen + back button).
   - Aturan desktop: full layout.
   - Catatan: bukan mobile-first. App = desktop-first tool.
3. Tambah baris di "Domain ↔ Komponen mapping" untuk komponen baru:
   - `ViewportGate` di `components/ViewportGate.tsx`.
   - `SidebarSheet` di `components/SidebarSheet.tsx`.
4. Tidak ada implementasi kode di issue ini — hanya dokumentasi. Implementasi: bead frontend scaffolding terpisah (lihat T1#10-T1#21).

## Acceptance

- Section "Viewport policy" eksis di `web/WEB_RULES.md`.
- 3 breakpoint dijelaskan dengan aturan.
- `<ViewportGate>` + `<SidebarSheet>` tercantum di tabel mapping.

## Tooling

- Tidak butuh context7.
- Tidak butuh graphify (dokumen markdown).
acceptance_criteria: Section Viewport policy eksis di web/WEB_RULES.md; 3 breakpoint dijelaskan; ViewportGate + SidebarSheet tercantum di tabel mapping.
